---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for SanskritNova AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Request

### Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve.

### Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

### Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Use Case
How would this feature benefit Sanskrit learners and users?

### Implementation Details
If you have technical details or implementation ideas:

- **API Changes**: New endpoints or modifications
- **UI Changes**: Frontend modifications
- **Database Changes**: New data structures
- **AI/ML Changes**: New models or processing

### Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (would improve user experience)
- [ ] High (critical for core functionality)
- [ ] Urgent (security or major bug fix)

### Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

### Related Issues/PRs
Link to any related issues or pull requests if applicable.

### Checklist
- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have provided clear problem statement and solution
- [ ] I have considered alternative approaches
- [ ] I have indicated priority level
